channel.title: Progress_updates on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Progress_updates on Zymacs

item.title: In pipeline
item.description:
This section will track all articles I plan to write, what the next article is, and what progress for the books I am currently reading.

Next article

  • Baye’s theorem

Drafted articles

  • How to install Arch
  • Baye’s theorem
  • Why copying smaller files takes longer
  • Git: All you need to know to for functional proficiency
  • Git: How the most used commands work
  • The linux file system
  • How to create a rule based folder structure enforcer script
  • YAML: All you need to know to be
  • How does auto complete work?
  • Bash: Scripting basics for functional proficiency
  • Project: Let’s write an auto complete addon for bash

Currently reading
